search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: What is the purpose of using an alternator in an automobile? And is there any alternative rather than using an alternator? Quora User, Enthusiast Answered Feb 10, 2015 · Author has 362 answers and 930.9k answer views An alternator supplies the power to run the vehicle electronics, ignition, lights etc and to charge the battery. The battery has to deal with a huge power drain when starting. The alternative is a generator
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses automobile alternators, which is unrelated to starting a YouTube channel.
